positive: A minimalist celestial forest scene, depicting stylized, bioluminescent trees with sweeping, gentle curves. The ground is covered in soft, glowing flora. Two stylized, ethereal moons hang in the twilight sky, casting a gentle, contrasting glow. The overall composition should be highly symmetric and centralized, featuring a strong silhouette against a deep indigo and emerald gradient. Clean vector art style, perfect for printing on apparel, highly detailed line work, limited color palette of teal, gold, and deep navy, 8k, clean lines, isolated background.
